headline: Mike Vrabel to seek counseling, won't be with Patriots for NFL draft Day 3
description: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel won't be with the team for the third day of the NFL draft Saturday, as he plans to be with his family this weekend outside of Massachusetts.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New Orleans Saints updates, intel, buzz
description: The Saints pick early in Round 1 and have eight total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what New Orleans might do.

headline: Andrew Novak might be the biggest NFL fan on the PGA Tour
description: Novak is getting ready to defend his title at the Zurich Classic, but he'll also be paying close attention to this week's NFL draft.

headline: Saints OC Doug Nussmeier encouraged to spend draft with son, Garrett
description: The Saints granted Doug permission to spend the draft with Garrett, encouraging him to be with his son on draft night.

headline: Sources: Draft prospect Caleb Banks (foot) expects June clearance
description: Florida's Caleb Banks, one of the top defensive tackles in this year's draft, is expected to be fully cleared for football activities in early June after offseason foot surgery, sources told ESPN.

headline: Bills GM Brandon Beane: This year's draft class is not top-heavy
